# Skill: `project-review` — プロジェクト横断レビュー

このディレクトリは GitHub 側の implementation surface です。skill の説明正本は `agents/skills/project-review.md` に置きます。

## Read First

1. `agents/skills/project-review.md`
1. `agents/skills/comprehensive-review.md`
1. `agents/skills/project-health.md`
1. `documents/REVIEW_PROCESS.md`

## Review Focus

- inventory: 正本、adapter、implementation surface、stale file
- static health: `pyright`、`ruff`、machine-readable config、link 整合
- workflow health: routing、skill、subagent、handoff の導線
- tooling health: scripts、CI、GitHub implementation surface
- follow-up: `fix now`、`follow-up`、`delete-ok`
